meta.description: Cron 9am daily → list Gitea repos updated in last 24h → fetch their commits → post a digest in Mattermost #town-square. Uses an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Gitea (admin) — Bearer' because n8n's native Gitea node is search/repo focused and the Gitea PAT works as 'Authorization: token <PAT>' on any endpoint. If you want a different cadence, edit the schedule trigger expression.
